title: MineMore
description: MineMore is A mod that adds an abundancy of new ores and new tool/armor sets, such as ruby ore, saphire ore, crystal ore, platinium & more!
body:
# What _is_ MineMore?

MineMore is a mod that adds plenty of vanilla-like features like **biomes**, **dimensions**, **mobs**, **blocks**, but most importantly, its main attraction, the **_ores_**. Including ores that can break bedrock, MineMore adds an abundancy of ores to explore and, after going through a long journey, eventually conquer progression, and defeat the mod's final boss---The Ore King.

MineMore's main modification is the ores and the journey, but there are also some unrelated features that make the survival experience much better. Some mobs make the game more dangerous and add a challenge, some structures add more exploration and meaning to the game and some biomes that just make the game more pretty.

# How does it work?

MineMore is like an extension of vanilla minecraft, it adds a path for you to follow after defeating the ender dragon and acquiring netherite, you'll have to acquire platinium, which is obtainable with a netherite pickaxe. With a smithing template, a block of platinium and a netherite ingot, you'll craft the titanium ingot. With a titanium pickaxe, you can get paladium. With a smithing template. a block of paladium and a titanium ingot, you'll get addamantium. Then, with addamantium, you will mine polyium, an ore that can break bedrock. With bedrock and Uranium, you will create a portal to the Nenther, the bedrock dimension. There, you will find an ore called Photon, which is stronger than any ore in the overworld.

After Photon, you move on to the next phase, the farlands. In the bottom of some dimensions, there are little blocks called farlands that replace bedrock. Photon pickaxes can mine these. With the farlands block, you can make a farlands pickaxe, and then mine the corrupted farlands. With the corrupted farlands, you'll go back to the Nenther and defeat the bedrock golem, who will drop a flower. With this flower, you can make bedrock essence that crafts a core block, and can power a rocket item that allows you to travel to the moon. On the moon, you will need to go to the bottom of the planet and mine the erupted farlands, then the rerupted farlands. After that, you are ready to find a tripo cave, defeat the Triporatus, acquire the ore key and build a portal to the ore dimension, where you will defeat the final boss, the Ore King.

# What features does it add?

Aside from the features I already stated, MineMore also adds plethora of mobs. Here is the list.

- The Earth Guardian
- Platypus
- Nether Orc
- Triporatus
- Bedrock Golem
- Ore King
- Jellyfish
- Crocodile
- Capybara
- Penguin
- Gorilla
- Mole
- Pangolin
- Toucan
- Hedgehog
- Koala
- Crab
- Racoon
- Chameleon
- Shoebill
- Mud Golem
- Ningen
- Squirrel
- Amethyst Golem
- Ore Golem

MineMore also adds the Amethyst Dungeon, a secret dungeon where you can find the smithing template, armor trims, and most importantly, the Amethyst Golem, who drops an Amethyst Axe, the most powerful weapon in the game. Some other things MineMore adds is an ice cave, a Willow forest, a magnesium geode, a new desert etc.
